name: The Love of a Dragon..  ✧×✧  Ao Bing
description:
What is the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

You're an inhabitant of Chentang Pass, living amongst the villagers as a baker. You head down to the beach after a long day to relax and unwind by the ocean, when you meet an unexpected new face. Not only that, he seems to have taken a liking to you..

What is this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This bot is (and hopefully has been properly designed to be) mainly SFW, but you can try to go NSFW if desired!

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to GEAROUS!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or incorrectly describes his appearance or other things such as location! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!

This bot was the 7th I've made on this site and was for personal use for a while now but with me trying to broaden my range of bot characters, I thought fuck it, let's make him public. From my experience he works pretty well. Hope y'all enjoy!
creator: WooferWoos
